name: /plugin-list --show-rules flag includes the namespaced rule ids for each installed plugin
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example && printf 'plugin_id: example
' > .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example/source.yaml && printf 'example/foo
example/bar
' > .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example/rules.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-list.sh" --show-rules 2>out.txt && grep -q 'example/foo' out.txt && grep -q 'example/bar' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
